meta.title: AfroBoost — AI for Afro-Caribbean entrepreneurs
meta.description: The AI that publishes your posts, answers your calls 24/7, and tells you what's working. Built for restaurants, bars, and small businesses.

banner.text: 15-day free trial · No credit card required · +20% growth guarantee

hero.subtitle: The AI that publishes your posts, answers your calls 24/7, and tells you what's working — built for restaurants, bars, and small businesses from the Afro-Caribbean diaspora.

pillars.title: Everything you need, in a single app.
pillars.subtitle: AfroBoost replaces half a dozen tools — content creation, phone agent, CRM, analytics — and makes them work together.

content.label: Pillar 1 — Marketing
content.title: Post effortlessly.
content.body: An AI that writes and publishes your Facebook and Instagram posts in your voice, your tone, your language.

agent.label: Pillar 2 — Customer service
agent.title: Never miss a customer.
agent.body: An AI agent handles calls 24/7, takes reservations, and transfers to you when it matters.
agent.demoLine1: Hi, this is the AfroBoost virtual agent!

intel.label: Pillar 3 — Decisions
intel.title: Decide with data.
intel.body: A weekly report and chat assistant that turn your data into clear next steps.

how.title: How it works.
how.subtitle: No complicated setup. The AI learns your business while you grab a coffee.

steps.s1Body: Facebook, Instagram, Google Business, calendar. Three clicks, no copy-pasting.
steps.s2Body: Give it your greeting, your services, your tone. The AI adapts to your voice.
steps.s3Body: Posts published, calls handled, customers retained. Track everything from the dashboard.

integrations.title: Plays nice with the tools you already use.
integrations.subtitle: Connect your channels in a few clicks. Everything stays centralized in AfroBoost.

pricing.title: A plan for every stage.
pricing.subtitle: 15-day free trial on every plan. No credit card required.
pricing.guarantee: +20% revenue guarantee in 90 days — or a full refund.

founders.title: An AI that speaks your language and understands your culture.
founders.body1: AfroBoost was born in Montreal, out of conversations with Afro-Caribbean restaurant owners and shopkeepers who spent their evenings writing posts instead of being with their families — and who missed calls because they were on service.
founders.body2: We're building the tool we wished we had: an AI that understands Creole dishes, Congolese celebrations, Friday-night specials. Designed for the diaspora, funded by the diaspora.

items.t1Quote: I don't write posts at night anymore. The AI drafts, I approve in 30 seconds. I got my weekends back.
items.t2Quote: The agent answers during service. We doubled Thursday reservations without hiring.
items.t3Quote: Monday's report tells me exactly what to push this week. My sales went up 23%.

items.q1: How does the 15-day free trial work?
items.a1: Download the app, create your account, pick a plan. No card required during the trial. You can cancel anytime from the settings before the period ends.
items.q2: Which languages does the phone agent support?
items.a2: French and English are available today. Haitian Creole, Lingala, and Swahili are coming in the next few months.
items.a3: Your data lives in Canada, encrypted at rest and in transit. We never sell your data. GDPR and Quebec Law 25 compliant.
items.a4: Facebook, Instagram, Google Business Profile, WhatsApp Business, SMS, Google Calendar. More channels added every quarter.
items.a5: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade from settings. Changes take effect on the next billing period.
items.a6: If you follow the AI's weekly recommendations for 90 days and don't see +20% revenue, we refund your full subscription.
items.q7: Do I need to be tech-savvy?
items.a7: No. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use AfroBoost. Onboarding takes 3 minutes and the AI handles the rest.
items.a8: None. It's month-to-month. Cancel whenever, no fees or questions.

finalCta.title: Join the owners who let AI do the work for them.
finalCta.subtitle: 15 days free. No card required. Cancel in one click.

footer.tagline: The AI that speaks your language, understands your culture, and grows your business.
footer.madeIn: Made in Montreal with ❤️ for the diaspora.
